race.comment: PEARL OF DUBAI (10) resumed in solid order in the Group 3 Widden Stakes and then was beaten less than 2L in second behind Music Time in the Group 3 Black Opal Stakes. Fitter again and draws low today. Won't know herself in Maiden grade and should have them well covered. ARTANEOUS (1) was in the market resuming in the Black Opal but was never in the hunt. He's been beaten 3L in the Group 3 Breeders Plate on debut, so he has a fair amount of ability. Has an awkward gate, but with the extra fitness, a much sharper effort is likely. POMELO CHAMOMILE (12) improved plenty second-up, beaten a nose over 1100m at Gosford. Will likely position forward and can make the finish with that run under the belt. TENENBAUM (5) was spelled after a solid enough debut effort over 900m at Newcastle. Resumes owning promising metro trials and, with the natural improvement, is likely to race well. OXFORD POWER (3) is a local on debut. Has an awkward gate, but he's won both trials and spaced them the latest.
